title: Geolfa kicks off 2024/25 season
description: FOOTBALL NEWS - The George Local Football...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"FOOTBALL NEWS - The George Local Football Association (Geolfa) kicked off last weekend with 16 teams. When the season ends, the Geolfa League winners will compete against other local football associations in the Inter LFAs championship later in the year.","html":"FOOTBALL NEWS - The George Local Football Association (Geolfa) kicked off last weekend with 16 teams. When the season ends, the Geolfa League winners will compete against other local football associations in the Inter LFAs championship later in the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 16 teams are Raul Stars, Burning Fire, Celtics, Paris United, Heaven Stars, Eastern City, Young Pirates, All Stars, Future Stars, Pacaltsdorp, Abahlali, Western Tigers, Vista, Bangalo, Black Cats and Silver Stars.","html":"The 16 teams are Raul Stars, Burning Fire, Celtics, Paris United, Heaven Stars, Eastern City, Young Pirates, All Stars, Future Stars, Pacaltsdorp, Abahlali, Western Tigers, Vista, Bangalo, Black Cats and Silver Stars."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Raul Stars defeated Burning Fire 4-2 in their opening Geolfa game on Sunday afternoon, 2 February, at Thembalethu Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siyabonga Aseni, Chulumanco Tyalana, Luvuyo Ncamile and Sivuyisiwe Tini contributed the four goals for Raul Stars, while Sivuyise Nyameni scored a brace for Burning Fire.","html":"Siyabonga Aseni, Chulumanco Tyalana, Luvuyo Ncamile and Sivuyisiwe Tini contributed the four goals for Raul Stars, while Sivuyise Nyameni scored a brace for Burning Fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Raul Stars players were controlling the game throughout the first half. At half time, Burning Fire was trailing 3-1. The second half saw Raul Stars' fourth goal netted by Sivuyisiwe Ntini and Nyameni's second goal for Burning Fire, originating from a penalty.","html":"Raul Stars players were controlling the game throughout the first half. At half time, Burning Fire was trailing 3-1. The second half saw Raul Stars' fourth goal netted by Sivuyisiwe Ntini and Nyameni's second goal for Burning Fire, originating from a penalty."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Weekend results","html":"Weekend results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sunday 2 February","html":"Sunday 2 February"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Raul Stars 4-2 Burning Fire","html":"Raul Stars 4-2 Burning Fire"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Celtics 2-2 Paris United","html":"Celtics 2-2 Paris United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heaven Stars 7-1 Eastern City","html":"Heaven Stars 7-1 Eastern City"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Young Pirates 0-2 All Stars (Young Pirates didn't honour their fixture)","html":"Young Pirates 0-2 All Stars (Young Pirates didn't honour their fixture)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Future Stars 3-0 FC Pacaltsdorp","html":"Future Stars 3-0 FC Pacaltsdorp"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Abahlali 3-2 Western Tigers","html":"Abahlali 3-2 Western Tigers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vista 2-0 Bangalore (Bangalore didn't honour their fixture)","html":"Vista 2-0 Bangalore (Bangalore didn't honour their fixture)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Black Cats 2 5-2 Silver Stars","html":"Black Cats 2 5-2 Silver Stars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
